# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## AI DEBUGGING CONTRACT ROUTER
- Follow the debugging contract for any bugs, regressions, or short commands like "fix this bug" or "error ni".
- Automatically load and adhere to [.ai/keyword-router.md](file:///c:/Users/USER/Desktop/_ref_flowkit/.ai/keyword-router.md).
- For Chrome Extension MV3 projects, you MUST load and follow [.ai/contracts/CHROME_EXTENSION_MV3_DEBUG_CONTRACT.md](file:///c:/Users/USER/Desktop/_ref_flowkit/.ai/contracts/CHROME_EXTENSION_MV3_DEBUG_CONTRACT.md).
- Audit all message listeners, senders, and lifecycle transitions before patching.
- Provide a validation proof and final report in the required format.
